pr.title: Non-Record: First Viable 3-Loop Recurrence — Birkhoff + Output-LN + Timestep Scaling (val_bpb=1.2659, 14 eff layers from 6 unique blocks)

output.summary: Three-loop recurrence with prelude/coda uses Output-LN, Birkhoff mixing, and capped timestep scales to tame quantization blowup across shared blocks.
techniques: Output-LN on MLP outputs preserves per-loop magnitude gradients
Birkhoff-constrained residual mix keeps shared loops spectral norm ≤1
Float16-capped timestep scales bypass int8 quantization collapse
